title: Acctim Cliffburn Mantel Clock Quartz Glass Lens Taupe
features: Elegant taupe mantel clock with a softly contoured case creates a modern yet timeless look, making it a stylish centrepiece for a living room mantelpiece, shelf or fireplace without overpowering the space.
Reliable quartz mantel clock movement delivers accurate everyday timekeeping, battery operated for easy placement anywhere in the home without cables, sockets or ongoing maintenance requirements.

Clear white dial with bold Roman numerals offers excellent readability from a distance, combining classic clock styling with a clean, contemporary finish that suits both traditional and modern interiors.
Protective glass lens enhances clarity while shielding the dial from dust and marks, helping maintain a neat appearance and long lasting performance as a decorative and functional table clock.
Well balanced mantelpiece clock proportions measuring 180 mm high, 190 mm wide and 60 mm deep provide strong visual presence while fitting comfortably on shelves, sideboards or fireplace mantels.
description: The Acctim Cliffburn mantel clock is a refined and practical timepiece designed to complement modern and classic interiors alike. Finished in a versatile taupe tone, this mantelpiece clock brings subtle colour and contemporary style to living rooms, fireplaces and shelving displays, making it an attractive focal point without dominating your décor. Designed as a freestanding mantel clock, the Cliffburn features a clean white dial with clearly defined Roman numerals, offering excellent readability while retaining the traditional charm expected from a classic mantelpiece clock. The contrasting numerals and hands ensure the time can be read easily from across the room, whether placed on a fireplace, sideboard or console table. At its core is a dependable quartz movement that provides accurate timekeeping with minimal effort. Powered by a single battery, this quartz mantel clock allows flexible positioning anywhere in the home without the need for mains power, trailing wires or frequent adjustments. A clear glass lens protects the dial while enhancing visibility and helping keep the clock looking smart over time. With its balanced proportions and understated design, the Acctim Cliffburn taupe mantel clock works equally well as a living room clock, bedroom mantelpiece clock or decorative table clock in an office or hallway. It is an ideal choice for customers seeking a modern mantel clock that blends reliable performance with timeless styling.
